title: leontodon coronopifolius
intro: Leontodon coronopifolius, also known as hawk's bit, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Hawk's bit can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
